headline: Netflix (NFLX) Is Buying Ben Affleck's AI Film Startup For $587 Million
summary: Netflix acquired InterPositive, an AI-focused film post-production startup co-founded by Ben Affleck, in a cash deal valued at $587 million. The company disclosed the transaction as it moves to integrate artificial intelligence tools more deeply into its content production workflows. The deal highlights Netflix's interest in applying AI to editing, visual effects, and other post-production tasks across its film slate. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:NFLX, this AI-focused acquisition lands...

headline: Netflix quietly reveals what AI did to 300 of its programs
summary: Every movie you have ever loved has lied to you. The city skyline was a matte painting. The shark was rubber and it barely worked. The crowd of 40,000 was 400 extras and a lot of patient duplication. Audiences have never actually wanted the truth from a screen. We want the trick to hold. Hollywood ...
